creator: novel@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Yuri Victorovich from comment #5)

As of gtk-vnc 0.7.2, python binding is deprecated and will be removed in the next release [1], I think it doesn't make much sense to add support for it now.

I've submitted a PR [2] that updates the port to 0.7.2 and allows to switch between GTK2 and GTK3.

1: https://www.berrange.com/posts/2018/03/23/announce-gtk-vnc-0-7-2-release/
2: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=226895
